zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Hastings於大約1330年出生在英國越可爾科比時，他的父親Ralph Hastings37歲，母親Margaret Herle36歲。他於1379年之前與Maud Sutton結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1397年10月27日在英國萊希斯特斯爾科比 姆可洛享年68歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Hastings于大约1330年出生在英国越可爾科比时，他的父亲Ralph Hastings37岁，母亲Margaret Herle36岁。他于1379年之前与Maud Sutton结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1397年10月27日在英国萊希斯特斯爾科比 姆可洛享年68岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Hastings was born about 1330, in Kirby, Yorkshire, England, his father, Ralph Hastings, was 37 and his mother, Margaret Herle, was 36. He married Maud Sutton before 1379. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 27 October 1397, in Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Hastings est né environ 1330, à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Hastings, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret Herle, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Maud Sutton avant 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 27 octobre 1397, à Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. Oktober 1397 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Maud Sutton prima del 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 ottobre 1397, nel Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Hastings(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 요르크실르 커비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Hastings(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Herle(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1379년 이전 Maud Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1397년 10월 27일 영국 레이스스터실르 커비 무스로이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 커비 벨라러스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Hastings nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Hastings, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Herle, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Sutton antes 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1397, em Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Hastings родился около 1330 г. в местности кирби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Hastings было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Herle, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Sutton перед 1379 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 27 октября 1397 г. в местности кирби муксло, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности кирби белларс, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Maud Sutton antes de 1379. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1397, en Kirby Muxloe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
